error: The sandbox was not found: This error is likely due to sandbox timeout. You can modify the sandbox timeout by passing 'timeout' when starting the sandbox or calling '.set_timeout' on the sandbox with the desired timeout.

p2p_enrich.notes: Added 4 repo_tests pass_to_pass gates: (1) test_repo_build_ty - cargo build --bin ty, (2) test_repo_clippy_ty_python_semantic - cargo clippy -p ty_python_semantic -- -D warnings, (3) test_repo_fmt_check - cargo fmt -- --check, (4) test_repo_ty_check_works - ty check on simple Python file. All verified passing on base commit b6c69c288fe9e5b63d70d1743aabdfa40523e344.
